info.name: Refuel Cloud API
info.description: REST API for the Refuel Cloud data-labeling and data-enrichment platform. Deployed applications transform rows of data in realtime via the label endpoint. Authentication uses a Refuel API key as a Bearer token.

item.name: Applications
item.description: Deployed applications served behind the Refuel Cloud REST API.

item.name: Transform rows with a deployed application

request.description: Submit a JSON array of input rows to a deployed application to run LLM labeling / prediction in realtime. Each row is an object whose keys match the application's expected input fields. The application applies its Task guidelines and returns the transformed (labeled / enriched) output for each row. Subject to a documented rate limit of 300 requests per minute and up to 100 concurrent requests; excess returns HTTP 429.
